name: Paralyzingly Long Kiss
descrip: Deeply kiss your opponent. Can charm them.
outcome: [AttackerName] leaves [TargetName] breathless as [AttackerHeOrShe] intensifies the deep kiss, sending her long tongue deeper into [TargetHisOrHer] mouth, assertively licking every corner of [TargetHisOrHer] mouth in an unbroken make out session, leaving [TargetName] increasingly kiss drunk.
miss: [AttackerName] leaves [TargetName] breathless as [AttackerHeOrShe] intensifies the deep kiss, sending her long tongue deeper into [TargetHisOrHer] mouth, but [TargetName] manages to endure the intense kiss!
statusOutcome: As the kiss drags on, numbing paralysis slowly seeps into [TargetName] from [AttackerName]'s sweetly sour venom soaked saliva filling [TargetHisOrHer] mouth, and all [TargetHeOrShe] can manage to do is gulp down more of the numbing toxin.
